defs: Following as a consequence, result, or logical inference; consequent.
quotes: All that is revealed in Scripture has a consequential necessity of being believed . . . because it is of divine authority.
These kind of arguments . . . are highly consequential and concludent to my purpose.

defs: Assuming or exhibiting an air of consequence; pretending to importance; pompous; self-important; as, a consequential man. See Consequence, n., 4.
